description: Remove highlight effect from previously highlighted fragments
utility: Fade out highlights with customizable duration

examples.scenario: Clear highlight from question fragment then highlight next (equation of a circle lesson)
examples.expression:
hidehighlight_3 = hidehighlight(fragment_3)
fragment_1 = fragment(paragraph_1, range(9, 11), effect(highlight), c(darkred), fc(gold), t(1))

examples.scenario: Clear highlight from circle keyword before next fragment (circle from diameter lesson)
Clear multiple fragments at once (axis intercepts lesson)
